'''thasuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qorban|qorban]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qorban|qorban]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thasuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæsizith|thæsizith]] || [[word:thæsizij|thæsizij]] || [[word:thæsizish|thæsizish]] || [[word:thæsizi|thæsizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thasusuzuth|thasusuzuth]] || [[word:thasusuzuj|thasusuzuj]] || [[word:thasusuzush|thasusuzush]] || [[word:thasusuzu|thasusuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasuzuth|thasuzuth]] || [[word:thasuzuj|thasuzuj]] || [[word:thasuzush|thasuzush]] || [[word:thasuzu|thasuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasufzuth|thasufzuth]] || [[word:thasufzuj|thasufzuj]] || [[word:thasufzush|thasufzush]] || [[word:thasufzuf|thasufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thasuzuthu|thasuzuthu]] || [[word:thasuzuju|thasuzuju]] || [[word:thasuzushu|thasuzushu]] || [[word:thasuzuku|thasuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thasuzuth|thasuzuth]] || [[word:thasuzuj|thasuzuj]] || [[word:thasuzush|thasuzush]] || [[word:thasuzu|thasuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thasuzuthul|thasuzuthul]] || [[word:thasuzujul|thasuzujul]] || [[word:thasuzushul|thasuzushul]] || [[word:thasuzukul|thasuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thasuzuthuthu|thasuzuthuthu]] || [[word:thasuzujuju|thasuzujuju]] || [[word:thasuzushushu|thasuzushushu]] || [[word:thasuzuku|thasuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thasuzuthun|thasuzuthun]] || [[word:thasuzujun|thasuzujun]] || [[word:thasuzushun|thasuzushun]] || [[word:thasuzukun|thasuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thasuzuthuoro|thasuzuthuoro]] || [[word:thasuzujuoro|thasuzujuoro]] || [[word:thasuzushuoro|thasuzushuoro]] || [[word:thasuzukuoro|thasuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
